prompt_text: Suggest a daily routine for a 70-year-old man.
response_text:
# Daily Routine for a 70-Year-Old Man

## Morning (7:00-9:00 AM)
- Wake at consistent time; light stretching in bed
- Bathroom routine; take medications with breakfast
- Eat nutritious breakfast (oatmeal, fruit, whole grain toast)
- Read news or listen to podcast with coffee

## Mid-Morning (9:00-12:00 PM)
- 20-30 minute walk or light exercise
- Mentally engaging activity (puzzles, learning, hobby)
- Light household tasks or gardening
- Social connection (call a friend/family)

## Lunch & Afternoon (12:00-3:00 PM)
- Balanced lunch with protein and vegetables
- Rest/quiet time (reading, napping if needed)
- Hobbies or creative pursuits
- Light tasks or volunteer work

## Late Afternoon (3:00-6:00 PM)
- Social activity (visit, group class, club)
- Meal prep or cooking
- Gentle movement (tai chi, yoga, stretching)

## Evening (6:00-9:00 PM)
- Nutritious dinner
- Family time or entertainment
- Relaxing activity (TV, audiobook, conversation)
- Wind-down routine 30 minutes before bed

## Sleep (9:00-10:00 PM)
- Consistent bedtime
- Limit screens
- 7-8 hours of sleep

**Key principles:** Consistency, balance of activity and rest, social engagement, and regular health monitoring.
